items.title: The teacher who won $1m for turning India's slums into open-air classrooms
items.dek: Rouble Nagi has spent the last three decades promoting learning among India's marginalised communities.

items.title: House committee advances bill to ban chemtrails
items.dek: “The fatal flooding of Camp Mystic last summer in Texas was not merely tragic happenstance, said multiple speakers at last week’s Alabama House State Government
items.body: “The fatal flooding of Camp Mystic last summer in Texas was not merely tragic happenstance, said multiple speakers at last week’s Alabama House State Government Committee—it was the direct result of chemtrails. “I have watched the weather, cloud-seeding in Texas and it happened right before Camp Mystic,” said Ted Holley, a frequent speaker on Republican bills. “And yes, it breaks my heart; but yes, that 500-year flood was the result of cloud-seeding in Texas.”” Alabama being Alabama? ROLL TIDE!!!!! submitted by /u/Medical_Corruption [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk
